title: StoryLegends Totems
description: Totems in the skins of players from the 'StoryLegends' server.
body:
## **Totems/pumpkins in player skins from the 'StoryLegends' server.**

### **For the resource pack to work, **you need****: OptiFine _or_ CIT resewn

In this resource pack, there are the following players:

```
- 7il777
- ofsi
- lendspele
- lulaim
- slides
- padoshva
- polski
- yappy
- yan
- goo9le
- clownpierce
- jeweler
- unknown
- cgmga
```


To get a totem/pumpkin, you need to write the player's nickname in the lower register (**in small letters**)

If you rename the pumpkin to the player's nickname, it will sit on your head.
